mapper.sql: id, user_id, consignee, phone, province, city, district, detailed_address, is_default
mapper.select: SELECT FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(is_default, 0) DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
